title: Missing check for has_portnum before using portnum value
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:765-788

In parse_data, portnum handling:
  if (info->has_portnum) {
      if (info->portnum == MESHTASTIC_PORTNUM_TEXT_MESSAGE_APP) {
          ...

This correctly checks has_portnum before using portnum. Good.

However, in the unsupported_operations table (lines 133-334), some entries have has_portnum=true but check against portnum values. The dispatch path uses this table for reporting, but if has_portnum is false and the table is searched, it could match incorrectly.

Actually, looking at lichen_meshtastic_adapter_unsupported_operations (lines 1925-1933), it just returns the static table. The caller is responsible for proper interpretation.

Not a bug in this code, but the API could be clearer about how to use has_portnum in the returned operations.
